name: Portify – Your Internet, One Place
description: Smart bookmark dashboard with cross-device sync, AI search, country tabs, drag & drop. Free, no sign-up.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://www.google.com data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'
